metadata.description: Internal marketplace for Phantom's Claude Code tooling. Distributes the portable parts of the AI Layer (the parts that aren't repo-specific) so any repo or any new contributor gets the team's baseline setup on day one.

plugins.name: phantom-ai-layer
plugins.description: The portable Phantom AI Layer — generic scoped-tests skill, the self-improving CLAUDE.md hook, the read-only explorer subagent, and the codebase-search MCP server. Repo-specific skills (connector-add, mcp-tool-add, release-tag-flow, etc.) intentionally stay in the Phantom repo's own .claude/ — they describe THIS codebase and don't travel.
